qwen3-32b.comment: Local vLLM (DEFAULT) — PHI never leaves your hardware. base_url_env reads the live /v1 URL from $VLLM_BASE_URL at run time (endpoint changes per job); use a literal base_url instead for a fixed server. Falls back to the next available model when VLLM_BASE_URL is unset.

gpt-4o.comment: Hosted Azure (ALTERNATIVE) — only use with a signed BAA, since clinical notes are PHI.
